name: Gaylord Intermediate School
description: Gaylord Intermediate School is a place to play pickleball in Gaylord, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Gaylord Sportsplex Otsego County
description: Gaylord Sportsplex Otsego County is a place to play pickleball in Gaylord, MI. There are 4 courts. 1 is indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
